title: Peppery Crumbly Vietnamese Chinese Cabbage Crlme
description: A midnight craving dish that combines the peppery kick of fresh ginger with the tender crunch of Chinese cabbage in a satisfying crumble texture.
instructions: Wash the Chinese cabbage thoroughly and remove any hard stems. Cut into bite-sized pieces.
Finely mince the ginger, garlic, and white pepper powder in a blender or food processor until you achieve a fine paste.
Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the minced ginger-garlic-white pepper mixture and sauté for about 2 minutes.
Add Chinese cabbage to the pan with salt and continue cooking until tender but still crisp, about 10-15 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning with more white pepper powder or salt if needed. Add brown sugar if desired for a subtle sweetness without overpowering other flavors.
